revision.text:
'''Raijin Shrine''' (雷神社, Ikazuchi-jinja, Raijin-jinja, Kaminari-jinja) refers to Shinto shrines located throughout Japan.
== Hokkaidō and Tōhoku Region == * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Daisen)|ja|雷神社 (大仙市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Daisen)|qq=}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Daisen|ja|大仙市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daisen|qq=}}, {{ill|Akita Prefecture|ja|秋田県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akita Prefecture|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kaminoyama)|ja|雷神社 (上山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kaminoyama)|qq=}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Kaminoyama|ja|上山市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminoyama|qq=}}, {{ill|Yamagata Prefecture|ja|山形県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamagata Prefecture|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kaneyama, Yamagata)|ja|雷神社 (山形県金山町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kaneyama, Yamagata)|qq=}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Kaneyama, Mogami District|ja|金山町 (山形県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaneyama, Mogami District|qq=}}, Mogami District, Yamagata Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kawanishi, Yamagata)|ja|雷神社 (山形県川西町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kawanishi, Yamagata)|qq=}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Kawanishi, Higashiokitama District|ja|川西町 (山形県)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawanishi, Higashiokitama District|qq=}}, Higashiokitama District, Yamagata Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Shirataka)|ja|雷神社 (白鷹町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Shirataka)|qq=}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Shirataka, Nishiokitama District|ja|白鷹町|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirataka, Nishiokitama District|qq=}}, Nishiokitama District, Yamagata Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|ja|雷神社 (福島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Fukushima|ja|福島市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukushima|qq=}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukushima Prefecture|qq=}}, at Ōtamachi 7. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|ja|雷神社 (福島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|qq=}} (Raijin-jinja) - Another location in Fukushima City, at Okabemachi Uchi. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kōriyama)|ja|雷神社 (郡山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kōriyama)|qq=}} (Kaminari-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Kōriyama|ja|郡山市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōriyama|qq=}}, Fukushima Prefecture, at Narukami 3-chōme. * {{ill|Asaka Raijin Shrine|ja|安積雷神社 (郡山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asaka Raijin Shrine|qq=}} (Asaka Kaminari-jinja) - Located in Kōriyama, at Hosonuma-chō.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Chikusei)|ja|雷神社 (筑西市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Chikusei)|qq=}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Chikusei|ja|筑西市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikusei|qq=}}, {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|ja|茨城県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ibaraki Prefecture|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Utsunomiya)|ja|御蔵山古墳#雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Utsunomiya)|qq=}} (Ikazuchi-jinja/Raijin-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Utsunomiya|ja|宇都宮市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya|qq=}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tochigi Prefecture|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Nagareyama)|ja|雷神社 (流山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Nagareyama)|qq=}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Nagareyama|ja|流山市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagareyama|qq=}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Prefecture|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Chiba City)|ja|雷神社 (千葉市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Chiba City)|qq=}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Chiba|ja|千葉市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|雷神社 (市原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Ichihara)|qq=}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Ichihara|ja|市原市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichihara|qq=}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Katori)|ja|雷神社 (香取市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Katori)|qq=}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Katori|ja|香取市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katori|qq=}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Asahi City)|ja|雷神社 (旭市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Asahi City)|qq=}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Asahi|ja|旭市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi|qq=}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Narita)|ja|雷神社 (成田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Narita)|qq=}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Narita|ja|成田市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Narita|qq=}}, Chiba Prefecture, at Yamaguchi 1205. Annual festival held on July 24. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Adachi)|ja|雷神社 (足立区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Adachi)|qq=}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Adachi|ja|足立区|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi|qq=}}, {{ill|Tokyo Metropolis|ja|東京都|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolis|qq=}}, in Nishiarai. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Yokosuka)|ja|雷神社 (横須賀市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Yokosuka)|qq=}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Yokosuka|ja|横須賀市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokosuka|qq=}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanagawa Prefecture|qq=}}.
== Hokuriku, Kōshin, Tōkai Region and Beyond == * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|qq=}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Toyooka, Hyōgo|ja|豊岡市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyooka, Hyōgo|qq=}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōgo Prefecture|qq=}}. A {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|式内名神大社|fr|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōjin Taisha|qq=}}. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|雷神社 (糸島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Itoshima)|qq=}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in {{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itoshima|qq=}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuoka Prefecture|qq=}}.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Raiden Shrine|ja|雷電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine|qq=}} * [[:en:Ikazuchi|Ikazuchi]] {{Disambiguation}}

== Hokkaidō and Tōhoku Region == * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Daisen)|ja|雷神社 (大仙市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Daisen)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Daisen, Akita|Daisen]], [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kaminoyama)|ja|雷神社 (上山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kaminoyama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Kaminoyama|Kaminoyama]], [[:en:Yamagata Prefecture|Yamagata Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kaneyama, Yamagata)|ja|雷神社 (山形県金山町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kaneyama, Yamagata)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Kaneyama, Yamagata|Kaneyama, Mogami District]], Mogami District, Yamagata Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kawanishi, Yamagata)|ja|雷神社 (山形県川西町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kawanishi, Yamagata)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Kawanishi, Yamagata|Kawanishi, Higashiokitama District]], Higashiokitama District, Yamagata Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Shirataka)|ja|雷神社 (白鷹町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Shirataka)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Shirataka|Shirataka, Nishiokitama District]], Nishiokitama District, Yamagata Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|ja|雷神社 (福島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Fukushima (city)|Fukushima]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]], at Ōtamachi 7. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|ja|雷神社 (福島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Another location in Fukushima City, at Okabemachi Uchi. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kōriyama)|ja|雷神社 (郡山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kōriyama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Kaminari-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Kōriyama|Kōriyama]], Fukushima Prefecture, at Narukami 3-chōme. * {{ill|Asaka Raijin Shrine|ja|安積雷神社 (郡山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asaka Raijin Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Asaka Kaminari-jinja) - Located in Kōriyama, at Hosonuma-chō.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Chikusei)|ja|雷神社 (筑西市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Chikusei)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Chikusei|Chikusei]], [[:en:Ibaraki Prefecture|Ibaraki Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Utsunomiya)|ja|御蔵山古墳#雷神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Utsunomiya)|qq=|1=Mikurayama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q115978238}} (Ikazuchi-jinja/Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Utsunomiya|Utsunomiya]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Nagareyama)|ja|雷神社 (流山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Nagareyama)|qq=|1=Ikazuchi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97311704}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Nagareyama|Nagareyama]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Chiba City)|ja|雷神社 (千葉市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Chiba City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Chiba (city)|Chiba]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|雷神社 (市原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Ichihara)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Ichihara, Chiba|Ichihara]], Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Katori)|ja|雷神社 (香取市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Katori)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Katori, Chiba|Katori]], Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Asahi City)|ja|雷神社 (旭市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Asahi City)|qq=}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Asahi, Chiba|Asahi]], Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Narita)|ja|雷神社 (成田市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Narita)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Narita, Chiba|Narita]], Chiba Prefecture, at Yamaguchi 1205. Annual festival held on July 24. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Adachi)|ja|雷神社 (足立区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Adachi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Adachi, Tokyo|Adachi]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Metropolis]], in Nishiarai. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Yokosuka)|ja|雷神社 (横須賀市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Yokosuka)|qq=|1=Hamakū Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660191}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Yokosuka|Yokosuka]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]].
== Hokuriku, Kōshin, Tōkai Region and Beyond == * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|qq=}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka, Hyōgo]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. A {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|式内名神大社|fr|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōjin Taisha|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|雷神社 (糸島市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Itoshima)|qq=|1=Ikazuchi-jinja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660192}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Itoshima, Fukuoka|Itoshima]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]].
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Raiden Shrine|ja|雷電神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine|qq=}} * [[:en:Ikazuchi|Ikazuchi]] {{Disambiguation}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11660190]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Raijin Shrine''' (雷神社, Ikazuchi-jinja, Raijin-jinja, Kaminari-jinja) refers to Shinto shrines located throughout Japan.
== Hokkaidō and Tōhoku Region == * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Daisen)|ja|雷神社 (大仙市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Daisen)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Daisen, Akita|Daisen]], [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kaminoyama)|ja|雷神社 (上山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kaminoyama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Kaminoyama|Kaminoyama]], [[:en:Yamagata Prefecture|Yamagata Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kaneyama, Yamagata)|ja|雷神社 (山形県金山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kaneyama, Yamagata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Kaneyama, Yamagata|Kaneyama, Mogami District]], Mogami District, Yamagata Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kawanishi, Yamagata)|ja|雷神社 (山形県川西町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kawanishi, Yamagata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Kawanishi, Yamagata|Kawanishi, Higashiokitama District]], Higashiokitama District, Yamagata Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Shirataka)|ja|雷神社 (白鷹町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Shirataka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Shirataka|Shirataka, Nishiokitama District]], Nishiokitama District, Yamagata Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|ja|雷神社 (福島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Fukushima (city)|Fukushima]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]], at Ōtamachi 7. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|ja|雷神社 (福島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Another location in Fukushima City, at Okabemachi Uchi. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kōriyama)|ja|雷神社 (郡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kōriyama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Kaminari-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Kōriyama|Kōriyama]], Fukushima Prefecture, at Narukami 3-chōme. * {{ill|Asaka Raijin Shrine|ja|安積雷神社 (郡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asaka Raijin Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Asaka Kaminari-jinja) - Located in Kōriyama, at Hosonuma-chō.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Chikusei)|ja|雷神社 (筑西市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Chikusei)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Chikusei|Chikusei]], [[:en:Ibaraki Prefecture|Ibaraki Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Utsunomiya)|ja|御蔵山古墳#雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Utsunomiya)|1=Mikurayama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q115978238}} (Ikazuchi-jinja/Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Utsunomiya|Utsunomiya]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Nagareyama)|ja|雷神社 (流山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Nagareyama)|1=Ikazuchi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97311704}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Nagareyama|Nagareyama]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Chiba City)|ja|雷神社 (千葉市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Chiba City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Chiba (city)|Chiba]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|雷神社 (市原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Ichihara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Ichihara, Chiba|Ichihara]], Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Katori)|ja|雷神社 (香取市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Katori)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Katori, Chiba|Katori]], Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Asahi City)|ja|雷神社 (旭市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Asahi City)|qq=}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Asahi, Chiba|Asahi]], Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Narita)|ja|雷神社 (成田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Narita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Narita, Chiba|Narita]], Chiba Prefecture, at Yamaguchi 1205. Annual festival held on July 24. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Adachi)|ja|雷神社 (足立区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Adachi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Adachi, Tokyo|Adachi]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Metropolis]], in Nishiarai. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Yokosuka)|ja|雷神社 (横須賀市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Yokosuka)|1=Ikazuchi Shrine(Yokosuka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660191}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Yokosuka|Yokosuka]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]].
== Hokuriku, Kōshin, Tōkai Region and Beyond == * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|qq=}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka, Hyōgo]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. A {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|式内名神大社|fr|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōjin Taisha|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|雷神社 (糸島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Itoshima)|1=Ikazuchi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660192}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Itoshima, Fukuoka|Itoshima]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]].
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Raiden Shrine|ja|雷電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine|qq=}} * [[:en:Ikazuchi|Ikazuchi]] {{disambiguation}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:雷神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11660190]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Raijin Shrine''' (雷神社, Ikazuchi-jinja, Raijin-jinja, Kaminari-jinja) refers to Shinto shrines located throughout Japan.
== Hokkaidō and Tōhoku Region == * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Daisen)|ja|雷神社 (大仙市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Daisen)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Daisen, Akita|Daisen]], [[:en:Akita Prefecture|Akita Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kaminoyama)|ja|雷神社 (上山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kaminoyama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Kaminoyama|Kaminoyama]], [[:en:Yamagata Prefecture|Yamagata Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kaneyama, Yamagata)|ja|雷神社 (山形県金山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kaneyama, Yamagata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Kaneyama, Yamagata|Kaneyama, Mogami District]], Mogami District, Yamagata Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kawanishi, Yamagata)|ja|雷神社 (山形県川西町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kawanishi, Yamagata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Kawanishi, Yamagata|Kawanishi, Higashiokitama District]], Higashiokitama District, Yamagata Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Shirataka)|ja|雷神社 (白鷹町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Shirataka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Shirataka|Shirataka, Nishiokitama District]], Nishiokitama District, Yamagata Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|ja|雷神社 (福島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Fukushima (city)|Fukushima]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]], at Ōtamachi 7. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|ja|雷神社 (福島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Fukushima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Another location in Fukushima City, at Okabemachi Uchi. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Kōriyama)|ja|雷神社 (郡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Kōriyama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Kaminari-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Kōriyama|Kōriyama]], Fukushima Prefecture, at Narukami 3-chōme. * {{ill|Asaka Raijin Shrine|ja|安積雷神社 (郡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asaka Raijin Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Asaka Kaminari-jinja) - Located in Kōriyama, at Hosonuma-chō.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Chikusei)|ja|雷神社 (筑西市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Chikusei)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Chikusei|Chikusei]], [[:en:Ibaraki Prefecture|Ibaraki Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Utsunomiya)|ja|御蔵山古墳#雷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Utsunomiya)|1=Mikurayama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q115978238}} (Ikazuchi-jinja/Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Utsunomiya|Utsunomiya]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Nagareyama)|ja|雷神社 (流山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Nagareyama)|1=Ikazuchi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97311704}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Nagareyama|Nagareyama]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Chiba City)|ja|雷神社 (千葉市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Chiba City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Chiba (city)|Chiba]]. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|雷神社 (市原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Ichihara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Ichihara, Chiba|Ichihara]], Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Katori)|ja|雷神社 (香取市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Katori)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Katori, Chiba|Katori]], Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Asahi City)|ja|雷神社 (旭市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Asahi City)|qq=}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Asahi, Chiba|Asahi]], Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Narita)|ja|雷神社 (成田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Narita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Raijin-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Narita, Chiba|Narita]], Chiba Prefecture, at Yamaguchi 1205. Annual festival held on July 24. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Adachi)|ja|雷神社 (足立区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Adachi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Adachi, Tokyo|Adachi]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Metropolis]], in Nishiarai. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Yokosuka)|ja|雷神社 (横須賀市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Yokosuka)|1=Ikazuchi Shrine(Yokosuka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660191}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Yokosuka|Yokosuka]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]].
== Hokuriku, Kōshin, Tōkai Region and Beyond == * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|雷神社 (豊岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Toyooka)|qq=}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka, Hyōgo]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. A {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|式内名神大社|fr|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōjin Taisha|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. * {{ill|Raijin Shrine (Itoshima)|ja|雷神社 (糸島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin Shrine (Itoshima)|1=Ikazuchi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660192}} (Ikazuchi-jinja) - Located in [[:en:Itoshima, Fukuoka|Itoshima]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]].
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Raiden Shrine|ja|雷電神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raiden Shrine|qq=}} * [[:en:Ikazuchi|Ikazuchi]] {{disambiguation}}
